mode_of_action_summary: Zinc plays a key role in enzyme activation, chlorophyll formation and growth hormone production. It corrects zinc deficiency, improves tillering in cereals and enhances overall crop vigor.

active_ingredients.name: Zinc (Zn)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Corrects zinc deficiency and improves enzyme activity and growth

deficiency_behavior.zinc_deficiency: Occurs mostly in rice and wheat under high pH soils and low organic matter

urdu: نئی پتیاں سفید یا پیلی ہیں

farmer_problem_queries: pattay peele ho rahe hain kya karein
growth ruk gayi hai crop ki

application_details.timing: Apply at early stage for best results

benefits: Improves tillering in rice and wheat
farmer_benefits: پودا ہرا بھرا ہو جاندا اے
گندم تے دھان دی ٹلرنگ ودھدی اے

multilingual_description.english: Zinc fertilizer for correcting deficiency and improving crop growth and tillering.
multilingual_description.urdu: زنک کی کمی کو دور کر کے فصل کی بڑھوتری بہتر بناتا ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: زنک دی کمی دور کر کے فصل نوں مضبوط کردا اے۔

embedding_text: WhatsApp Zinc fertilizer contains zinc 33 percent and is used for correction of zinc deficiency and khaira disease in crops like rice and wheat. It improves tillering, leaf greenness and crop growth especially in early stages.
